mapper.select:
SELECT BACO.GATE_CD ,BACO.BUYER_CD ,BACO.BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD_ORI ,BACO.PUR_ORG_CD ,GETBUYERNAME(BACO.GATE_CD, BACO.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM ,GETPURORGNAME(BACO.GATE_CD, BACO.BUYER_CD, BACO.PUR_ORG_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PUR_ORG_NM ,BACO.CTRL_CD ,BACO.CTRL_CD AS CTRL_CD_ORI ,BACO.CTRL_NM ,BACO.CTRL_NM_ENG ,BACO.CTRL_TYPE ,BACO.USE_FLAG ,'U' AS INSERT_FLAG ,(SELECT COUNT(CTRL_CD) FROM STOCBAMT WHERE GATE_CD = BACO.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = BACO.BUYER_CD AND CTRL_CD = BACO.CTRL_CD AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS MAPPING_ITEMS ,(SELECT COUNT(CTRL_CD) FROM STOCBACP WHERE GATE_CD = BACO.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = BACO.BUYER_CD AND CTRL_CD = BACO.CTRL_CD AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PIC_NUMBER ,BACO.SORT_SQ ,BACO.COMPANY_TYPE FROM STOCBACO BACO LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCOGPU OGPU ON (BACO.GATE_CD = OGPU.GATE_CD AND BACO.BUYER_CD = OGPU.BUYER_CD AND BACO.PUR_ORG_CD = OGPU.PUR_ORG_CD AND OGPU.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCOGCM OGCM ON (BACO.GATE_CD = OGCM.GATE_CD AND BACO.BUYER_CD = OGCM.BUYER_CD) WHERE BACO.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BACO.COMPANY_TYPE = 'B' AND BACO.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND OGCM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND BACO.USE_FLAG = '1' AND BACO.BUYER_CD = #{ses.manageCd} AND BACO.CTRL_CD NOT IN (SELECT CODD.CODE FROM STOCCODD CODD WHERE CODD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CODD.CODE_TYPE = 'M408' AND CODD.LANG_CD = 'KO' AND CODD.TEXT1 != #{ses.deptCd} AND CODD.DEL_FLAG = '0')
AND BACO.CTRL_TYPE = #{CTRL_TYPE}
AND UPPER(BACO.CTRL_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(BACO.CTRL_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_NM}) '%'
ORDER BY BACO.USE_FLAG DESC, BACO.CTRL_CD, BACO.SORT_SQ

SELECT USR.USER_NM AS USER_NM ,BACP.CTRL_USER_ID AS USER_ID ,BACP.CTRL_USER_ID AS USER_ID_V ,USR.EMPLOYEE_NUM ,BACP.USE_FLAG ,USR.DEPT_NM ,getUserName(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.MOD_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS US_MOD_USER_NM ,BACP.MOD_DATE AS US_MOD_INFO FROM STOCBACP BACP JOIN STOCCVUR USR ON (BACP.CTRL_USER_ID = USR.USER_ID AND BACP.GATE_CD = USR.GATE_CD) WHERE BACP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BACP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USR.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND BACP.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND BACP.CTRL_CD = #{CTRL_CD_S} ORDER BY BACP.CTRL_USER_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCCVUR SET MNG_YN = (CASE WHEN (#{DEL_FLAG}, '0') = '1' THEN '0' ELSE (CASE WHEN (#{USE_FLAG},'0') = '1' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) END) WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID = (CASE WHEN (#{CTRL_USER_ID},'X') = 'X' THEN #{CTRL_USER_ID_ORI} ELSE #{CTRL_USER_ID} END) AND USER_TYPE = 'B' AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.select:
SELECT BACO.CTRL_TYPE , CVUR.USER_NM AS USER_NM , BACP.USE_FLAG , BACP.GATE_CD , BACP.GATE_CD AS GATE_CD_ORI , BACP.BUYER_CD , BACP.BUYER_CD AS BUYER_NM , BACP.BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD_ORI , BACP.CTRL_CD , BACP.CTRL_CD AS CTRL_CD_ORI , BACP.CTRL_USER_ID AS CTRL_USER_ID , BACP.CTRL_USER_ID AS CTRL_USER_ID_ORI , 'U' AS INSERT_FLAG ,(BACP.REG_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi') AS REG_DATE ,(BACP.MOD_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi') AS MOD_DATE , GETCTRLNAME(BACP.GATE_CD, BACO.BUYER_CD, BACP.CTRL_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_NM , GETBUYERNAME(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , getDeptName(CVUR.GATE_CD, CVUR.COMPANY_CD, CVUR.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , getUserName(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM , getUserName(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.MOD_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS MOD_USER_NM FROM STOCBACP BACP JOIN STOCBACO BACO ON (BACO.GATE_CD = BACP.GATE_CD AND BACO.CTRL_CD = BACP.CTRL_CD AND BACO.BUYER_CD = #{ses.manageCd}) JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (BACP.CTRL_USER_ID = CVUR.USER_ID AND BACP.BUYER_CD = CVUR.COMPANY_CD AND BACP.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD) WHERE BACP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BACP.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND BACP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND BACO.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND BACO.CTRL_TYPE = #{CTRL_TYPE}
AND UPPER(GETCTRLNAME(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.BUYER_CD, BACP.CTRL_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(CVUR.USER_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(CVUR.USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(CVUR.DEPT_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{DEPT_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(getDeptName(CVUR.GATE_CD, CVUR.COMPANY_CD, CVUR.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{DEPT_NM}) '%'
ORDER BY BACO.CTRL_TYPE, BACP.CTRL_CD, CVUR.USER_NM
